title: Earnings Growth & Price Strength Make Quanta Services (PWR) a Stock to Watch
text: Wondering how to pick strong, market-beating stocks for your investment portfolio? Look no further than the Zacks Focus List.

title: Quanta (PWR) Gains From Energy Transition Spree Amid Challenges
text: More demand for infrastructure solutions, aiding energy-transition efforts and modernization, will drive growth for Quanta Services (PWR). COVID-19 impacts and project delays are risks.

title: Quanta Services: More Renewable Power Could Bring Stock Price Up
text: Quanta Services offers specialty contracting infrastructure solutions mainly for clients in the electric and gas industry in the United States. If Quanta continues to invest organically or inorganically in the renewable power generation market, Quanta's revenue growth will likely increase.
